1.product_name: Organic Powdered Matcha (Whole Leaf Green Tea)
1.description: Organic matcha green tea powder from Japanese farms Shade-grown leaves for vibrant green color and rich flavor Ground into fine powder perfect for beverages and baking Kosher and Non-GMO certified Versatile for cold drinks, hot lattes, and smoothies Premium quality from Whole Foods Market

5.description:
Ceremonial Grade Matcha
Rich in Antioxidants
No Sifting or Whisking 
10 single-serving packets per box 
Aiya's Matcha To Go Sticks pack a unique blend of traditional Ceremonial Grade Matcha in a convenient single-serving stick. No need for sifting or whisking; simply add one stick to cold or hot water, then quickly shake or stir to enjoy Matcha anytime, anywhere. With approximately half the caffeine found in a cup of coffee, enjoy the smooth, natural energy boost of Matcha for 3 to 6 hours. By blending Matcha with dietary fiber, we reduce clumping, one of the natural effects of Matcha preparation. Similar to our Ceremonial Matcha, Matcha To Go is intended to be used exclusively with water to

9.product_name: Sugar Free Sweetened Matcha To Go Sticks
9.description:
Sugar Free Sweetened Matcha Blend
For Lattes & Smoothies
Just Add Milk
Aiya's Sugar Free Sweetened Matcha To Go, sweetened with stevia, is a guilt-free Matcha latte mix packaged in convenient single-serving sticks. Featuring an easy-tear film, the Sugar Free Sweetened Matcha To Go packets are the perfect option for those on-the-go.
Preparation
Matcha Latte: Mix contents of 1 packet in 6 oz of a dairy or non-dairy hot or cold milk. Stir and enjoy.Matcha Smoothie: Add contents of 1 packet, 6-8 oz of a dairy or non-dairy milk, and a scoop of ice to a blender. Blend until smooth. 
Size: 41 grams (1.45 oz)
Servings: 10 single-serving sticks per box

10.description:
**Previously known as Matcha Zen Café Blend**
 
Sweetened Matcha blend
Great for lattes, smoothies, and other blended drinks
Quick and easy
Aiya's Sweetened Matcha Blend is a sweet, delicate mixture of antioxidant-rich Japanese Matcha green tea and pure cane sugar, allowing for quicker preparation of Matcha lattes, smoothies, and other culinary applications. Created for café-inspired drinks, this sweetened tea blend provides all the same health benefits of Matcha. Just add a scoop to create your own delicious beverage!
Size: 1 kilogram (2.2 lbs)
Servings: Approximately 66 (8-oz) servings

12.description:
Sweetened Matcha Blend
For Lattes & Smoothies
Just Add Milk
Aiya's Sweetened Matcha To Go is a sweet, delicate mixture of our antioxidant-rich Culinary Grade Matcha green tea powder and pure cane sugar, packed into single-serving packets. Suited for Matcha lattes and smoothies, it provides all of the same health benefits of Matcha even for those with a sweet tooth. Featuring an easy-tear film, Aiya Sweetened Matcha To Go packets are the perfect option for those on-the-go.
PreparationMatcha Latte: Mix contents of 1 packet in 6 oz of a dairy or non-dairy hot or cold milk. Stir and enjoy.Matcha Smoothie: Add contents of 1 packet, 6-8 oz of a dairy or non-dairy milk, and a scoop of ice to a blen

65.description:
Experience a vibrant tasting journey with our curated Matcha Sampler—featuring 1oz each of five unique blends: Uji Kyoto Premium Ceremonial Grade Matcha, Hibiscus Matcha, Earl Grey Matcha, Peppermint Matcha, and Black Tea Matcha..
Discover traditional Japanese matcha alongside bold, creative flavors—perfect for lattes, wellness rituals, or exploring new combinations at home. With 1oz of each blend, this sampler is ideal for gifting, tasting, or refreshing your daily tea ritual. Whether you’re a matcha devotee or new to the world of matcha, there’s something inside to spark your creativity and delight every cup!

97.description:
Harvested in summer instead of spring
As a result, the powdered matcha is higher in catechins and renders an earthier, slightly more astringent flavour
Ideal for mixed beverages, like a delicious matcha latte with almond milk, or as an addition to a green smoothie.

158.description:
Winner Of Great Taste 2021
Our Heapwell Premium Matcha is not just any matcha—it's a ceremonial grade matcha that has been honored with the prestigious Great Taste award in 2021. This recognition is a testament to its rich and smooth taste profile, which delicately balances subtle sweetness with a deep, satisfying flavor, entirely free of bitterness. It's the best matcha powder for those who cherish quality and authenticity in their cup.
 ✓ Product of Japan
 ✓ Award-Winning Quality
 ✓ Shade Grown & Stone Ground
 ✓ Rich Flavour Profile

170.description:
A Uji Matcha Blended from Carefully Selected Tencha, Including Competition-Grade Lots, and Refined by the Tea Master's Expertise
 
Focusing on hand-picked high-grade tea leaves that won awards at fairs, we blend well-balanced tea leaves that have a good aroma and strong umami. It is characterized by its mellow taste and umami. Please enjoy the well-balanced taste, richness, and umami unique to blended tea leaves that are different from single-origin products.
 
Origin：Kyoto, Japan
Source
Composition：Traditional Uji Matcha Blend
Tea Gardens：Uji and Kumiyama, Kyoto
Cultivars：Samidori, Asahi
*Tea garden names follow the naming conventions used by the JA Zen-Noh Kyoto Tea Market.
Harvest
Harvest

181.description:
In name and in truth, from the center of Uji—
Uji, Uji City, Kyoto.
 
Composed solely from this central district,
where the history, craft, and circulation of Uji matcha have long converged.
 
A clear green hue.
Refined umami.
A fine, delicate foam.
A lingering, lucid finish.
 
Without explanation, sip by sip, one simply nods—
“This is Uji.”
 
A cup crafted exclusively from the heartland where the name of Uji matcha was nurtured.
 
The very center of Uji—
just as it is.
It is suitable for both koicha (thick tea) and usucha (thin tea).
 
Presented in a wooden box, it is ideal for serving to guests as well as for gifts.
 
 
Origin：Kyoto, Japan
Source
Composition：Single Tea Garden, Single Culti

201.product_name: Matcha Green Tea Sweet Powder Bag
201.description:
Enjoy a delicious matcha latte or smoothie with this convenient sweetened green tea powder made from Japan’s treasured matcha, finely milled from high quality green tea leaves. Made using the entire tea leaf, matcha is vibrant in taste and full of powerful health benefits. This green tea powder is a versatile ingredient that can be added to any new recipe — whether hot or cold.
Matcha is rich in vitamin C, catechins, EGCGs and L-theanine
Caffeine Content: approx. 2.4 mg/g

202.product_name: Matcha Love Barista Craft Blend Sweetened Matcha Powder Mix
202.description: Our barista craft blend is pre-blended with 100% Japanese matcha and real sugar for easy application—no steeping or brewing necessary. It's easy to use for beverages, hot or cold, and perfect for smoothies too!

203.product_name: Matcha Love Culinary Grade Matcha Powder
203.description:
Make with it, bake with it––there are so many culinary treats and delicacies to create with this precious powder that go beyond the traditional tea ceremony. Concoct everything from baked goods to smoothies to savory sauces.
Rich in Vitamin C with a natural "calming" energy boost.
Fresh balance of sweetness and herbaceous grassiness.
Perfect for creative cooking, baking, smoothies and lattes.
Shelf Life: 18 months
Storage: Avoid high temperature and high humidity. Reseal tightly after opening.

204.product_name: Matcha Love Organic Ceremonial Matcha Powder
204.description:
This superior-quality certified organic matcha makes a cup that is velvety, yet has a just-plucked energy that finishes smooth and herbaceous on the tongue.
Matcha is rich in vitamin C, catechins, EGCGs and L-theanine
Caffeine Content: approx. 31mg/g

205.product_name: Matcha Love Single-Serve Unsweetened Matcha Powder Sticks
205.description:
Bring 100% Japanese matcha on the go with matcha LOVEs single serve sticks. No matter where the day goes, stay grounded by taking your tea ritual with you.
Each box contains 15 single-serve Japanese matcha sticks with no added sugar or sweeteners.
Perfect for preparing both hot and cold matcha.
For cold matcha, add 1 packet to 16.9 fl oz. of cold water or milk. Shake vigorously till matcha powder is evenly distributed.
For hot matcha, add 1 packet to 6 to 8 fl oz. of hot water or milk, stir till evenly matcha powder is evenly distributed.
Matcha is rich in vitamin C with the natural, calming energy boost that comes from the theanine found naturally in green teas.

206.product_name: Oi Ocha Green Tea Powder with Matcha
206.description:
Made with real Japanese green tea leaves & matcha
Instantly dissolves in hot or cold water
No added sweeteners, preservatives, or colors
Each pack makes 40 cups of green tea (4 liters)
Product of Japan

A superfood with super versatility, matcha green tea is for more than drinking. Kenko Tea offers organic cooking-grade matcha tea: a quality organic matcha available in a larger 100g bags. A versatile ingredient, Kenko Cooking Grade Matcha Tea provides a stronger green tea flavour and light astringency to your cooking, blending, shaking and baking.

465.description:
Description:
Instantly smooth and delicious. No whisking needed.
Barista’s Matcha Green Tea Latte is a mix of our Barista's Premium Japanese matcha with non-GMO coconut milk powder and vanilla. No sugar or sweeteners added, no whisking needed. Barista's Matcha Latte is instantly delicious with only the addition of hot water and a good stir.
Non-GMO, Vegan, Gluten Free, Keto. No Sugar Added
Directions: Add hot water to 1 level tablespoon of Barista’s Latte powder and stir well. Add sweetener (or more milk) if desired.
Ingredients: Coconut Milk Powder, Barista's Japanese Matcha, Vanilla Extract
Nutrition Facts:Per 1 serving (1 level Tbsp / 7g)15 servings per pouch
Calories 35Fat 2gCarbohydrate

466.description:
Premium Matcha Green Tea without the premium price.
Barista’s Premium Matcha Green Tea is a blend of smooth tasting ceremonial matcha leaves and slightly bolder tasting midsummer ones, producing a matcha green tea with bold earthy tones and a well-balanced nutrient profile of L-theanine, catechin antioxidants, and caffeine.
Best for matcha lattes and matcha smoothies but still nice enough for traditional style matcha and for those who prefer a stronger taste. This is a premium Japanese matcha without the premium price.
Tested for lead and heavy metals.
2.8 oz tin / 80 servings

467.description:
Creamy and Delicious, No Whisking Needed
PREMIUM JAPANESE MATCHA: We use our high-quality Barista's Premium Japanese matcha powder blended with coconut milk powder for a rich, creamy strawberry latte experience.
INSTANT MIX: This matcha latte powder dissolves quickly and easily with just water — no whisking or special equipment needed for a smooth, café-quality drink at home.
STRAWBERRY FLAVOR: Enjoy a delightful twist on classic matcha with a gently sweetened strawberry flavor that perfectly complements the earthy notes of premium green tea.
VEGAN AND DAIRY-FREE: Made with coconut milk powder instead of dairy, this matcha latte mix is suitable for vegan and dairy-free lifestyles without sac

470.description:
Certified Organic Ceremonial Grade Japanese Matcha Tea (USDA/JONA). Made from hand picked, first harvest tea leaves, extremely smooth tasting, ideal for traditional style matcha and iced matcha.
Traditionally Grown and Harvested. Unlike other matcha teas, Tea Lover’s Ceremonial Matcha is shade grown and hand-picked at the first flush of spring when the leaves are young and fresh, bursting with the nutrients green tea is famous for. After picking, the leaves are lightly steamed, air dried, de-stemmed and cut into smaller pieces, called 'tencha'. The tencha leaves are then aged for a few months to reduce the bitterness of any tannins. Finally, the leaves are slowly stone ground into an ultra f

492.description:
Seimei · Okumidori · Kirari · YabukitaFour single-cultivar matchas from Yame, Fukuoka. 4 × 20g sachets. 40 servings of matcha.
Yame is the region matcha drinkers go to for nutty character: warm, toasted, roasted-grain. All four of these carry that signature; the set is a spectrum of how loudly each cultivar speaks it.
Seimei - mellow umami, a clear thread of sweetness, a quiet nutty undertone. The gentlest of the four.
Okumidori - mild and smooth, balanced end-to-end. The lightest and least nutty of the set. The one that leans into pure clean finish.
Kirari - bold, deeply nutty, full-bodied umami without the marine edge. Hazelnut and brown butter.
Yabukita - the nuttiest of the set: almost l

494.description: Navitas Organics instant Matcha Latte Mix is your superfood shortcut to an energized, grounded morning. Made of premium matcha with coconut creamer and a touch of sweetness, it's nutritious, dairy-free and delicious to boot. Just add hot water or milk of choice or pour over ice & enjoy!

495.description: Tangy lemon, creamy cashew & a hint of vanilla is a matcha made in heaven! Puns aside, our date-sweetened Superfood+ Lemon Cashew Matcha BITES are serious about their organic, whole-food ingredients & energizing superfood boosts.

519.description: Drinking Matcha Sampler Set is a great way to try our highest quality drinking Matchas. Set includes 5g samples of Okumidori, Samidori and Gokou Matchas, all of which have vivid green color, smooth frothy texture and well defined rich umami flavor.

536.description:
SHIZUOKA MATCHA GREEN TEA POWDER
Shizuoka Matcha is our new ceremonial-grade matcha, made from carefully selected young first-flush green tea leaves grown in Shizuoka, central Japan—Japan’s largest and most historically significant tea-producing region. Shizuoka’s mild climate, pure mountain water, and mineral-rich volcanic soils create ideal conditions for producing an exceptionally balanced matcha. 
50g
100% Yabukita / Asatsuyu cultivar
Ceremonial grade
Resealable pouches
Traditionally stone milled
Freshly prepared and shipped in small batches to ensure freshness
Blended for us by the winner of the 46th Japanese Ministry of Agriculture Tea Competition (2016) - the most prestigious tea comp

571.description:
rocky's matcha is excited to offer another limited run of single cultivar matcha from award winning producer, Mr. Kiyoharu Tsuji. The Samidori cultivar offers a sweet creamy flavor and is the most gentle of Tsuji-san's offerings. Like all of Tsuji-san's single cultivar matcha's, this matcha is shade grown, hand picked, and stone milled.
 
+ Single Cultivar Samidori Matcha
+ Ceremonial Grade
+ Cultivar: Samidori
+ Region: Uji, Japan
+ Net Weight: 20g

663.description: Tranquil GreenWe've blended organic Japanese matcha powder with fine, organic green tea leaves and fragrant lavender. Delight in the fresh, vibrant taste of spring in this jade-hued cup, perfect for pairing with sweet treats or uplifting moments. Tradition, One Step RemovedMatcha is the star of the centuries-old Japanese tea ceremony. The tea is prepared traditionally in single portions, whipped to a frothy green with a bamboo whisk. We appreciate your understanding and apologize for any inconvenience this may cause you. For any questions, please contact our Citizen Services Department. Organic MatchaA smooth vegetal sweetness that blends into a delicious Matcha latte. Made with organic green tea powder. *Refrigerate immediately after opening. Unopened shelf life: 1 year, Opened shelf life: 90 days. 64 servings.

668.description: This unique innovation allows Citizens to make premium organic matcha tea easily and conveniently, whether at home or on the go. Featuring a touch of monk fruit and the prebiotic agave inulin, each Single Sips® packet makes a slightly sweetened cup of matcha with just 15 calories. Add a Single Sips® packet directly to a bottle of water for a chilled matcha simply pour, shake and sip! If you prefer a freshly made cup of matcha wherever you are, add a packet to hot water then give it a stir; no need for fancy whisks or frothers. Each tin includes 14 individual Single Sip packets for a two-week supply.

670.description: 100% Premium Japanese MatchaPremium Natural U•Matcha™ is unlike regular green tea, these tender, shade-grown leaves are ground to a fine powder creating a rich balance of flavors in baked goods or ice cream. This exceptional tea is abundant in nutrients and has the balanced flavors of what is referred to as umami (literally, 'yummy' in Japanese). Premium Natural U•Matcha™ is great blended into water for sipping, powder and all, or in cooking. Store in refrigerator after opening.

675.description: Creamy texture with light, grassy, vegetal sweetness.

686.product_name: Pure Green Tea Powder / Matcha Tea Powder

688.description: Ingredients: Green tea Cultivar: Samidori 早緑 meaning “early green” (not to be confused with Saemidori 冴緑 meaning “young green”) Cultivation: Cultivated using centuries-old traditional methods with the exception of plastic canopy shading instead of traditional reeds and straw. Tsuji-san also conducts soil analysis monthly and analysis of amino acid content in the leaf (which forms the umami flavor) annually to craft the best leaf year after year. Field used for competition grade tencha as well. Harvest: May (see variant info for year...in general leaves are aged for about 5 months before grinding is allowed so the newest harvest is released in Oct-Nov)....

Tsuji-san also conducts soil analysis monthly and analysis of amino acid content in the leaf (which forms the umami flavor) annually to craft the best leaf year after year. Field used for competition grade tencha as well.
